items.prompt: cmd <<EOF … EOF feeds the body to the command’s…

items.explain: Quoted delimiter disables parameter expansion in the body.

items.prompt: <<< "text" is a here-string: one string becomes stdin.
items.explain: Here-string is the one-line form of feeding stdin.

items.prompt: The closing EOF must usually be…
choices: Alone on its line matching the opening delimiter
Omitted if the file is short
items.explain: The end marker must match and typically sit alone on the line.
